sred-scientific-research-experimental-de: The Short Answer: The SR&ED program is Canada's largest R&D incentive, allowing businesses to claim a 35% federal refundable tax credit on eligible scientific research and experimental development costs. When stacked with provincial credits, you can recover up to 65% of your total R&D expenditures. Filing requires detailed technical narratives demonstrating technological uncertainty and systematic investigation.
